name: html-anything
description: Turn any file into the best possible HTML reading experience for that specific content — designed by an LLM, rendered as a single self-contained file.

scripts.examples: tsx src/cli.ts examples/markdown/input.md --out examples/markdown/output.html --title 'The Long, Slow, Inevitable Death of the PDF' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/whatsapp/input.txt --out examples/whatsapp/output.html --title 'Alex & Mira' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/csv/input.csv --out examples/csv/output.html --title 'Coffee Equipment Sales — January 2026' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/email/input.mbox --out examples/email/output.html --title 'Acme x Clockless — Mailbox Snapshot' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/pdf/input.pdf --out examples/pdf/output.html --title 'The State of Mid-Market Battery Storage — 2026 Outlook' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/docx/input.docx --out examples/docx/output.html --title 'RFC-014: Pricing Page V2 — Decision Memo' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/transcript-sales-call/input.vtt --out examples/transcript-sales-call/output.html --title 'Northwind × Clockless — Pilot Scoping Call' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/transcript-product-meeting/input.srt --out examples/transcript-product-meeting/output.html --title 'Pricing Page V2 — Sprint Review' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/git-diff/input.diff --out examples/git-diff/output.html --title 'checkout-service: session expiry verification' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/pr-review/input.patch --out examples/pr-review/output.html --title 'PR — pending-charge queue + webhook drain' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/ci-log/input.log --out examples/ci-log/output.html --title 'CI failure — feat/payment-pending-queue (run #482)' && tsx src/cli.ts examples/stack-trace/input.txt --out examples/stack-trace/output.html --title 'Production stack trace — invoice tax-rate KeyError'
